steps.title: Find f from the table points
steps.content: Use the points $(-4,0)$ and $\left(-\frac{19}{5},1\right)$. The slope is $$m=\frac{1-0}{-\frac{19}{5}-(-4)}=\frac{1}{\frac{1}{5}}=5.$$ Substitute $(-4,0)$ into $f(x)=5x+b$ to get $b=20$, so $f(x)=5x+20$.

steps.title: Apply h(x) = f(x) - 13
steps.content: Now subtract $13$ from the whole function: $$h(x)=f(x)-13=(5x+20)-13=5x+7.$$ A quick check at $x=-4$ gives $h(-4)=-13$, which is $13$ less than $f(-4)=0$. That matches choice B.
